verdict_reasoning: CRISP1 is secreted by the epididymis but binds to the sperm surface (dorsal head/postacrosomal region) during epididymal maturation, where it remains stably associated and participates in sperm-egg fusion. This is a wash-resistant post-translational attachment to a specialized germline cell surface acquired during transit through the epididymal lumen, restricted to the male germline lineage.
